styles.name: Lo-fi Chill
styles.prompt_template: Create a lo-fi chill remix of [SONG_NAME]. Keep the melody but make it relaxing, 80 BPM, with ambient vibes.

styles.name: EDM Remix
styles.prompt_template: Remix [SONG_NAME] as an upbeat EDM track. Energy level 8/10, 120 BPM, heavy bass drops.

styles.name: Jazz Cover
styles.prompt_template: Create a smooth jazz interpretation of [SONG_NAME]. Soft instruments, 100 BPM, elegant arrangement.

styles.name: Acoustic Stripped
styles.prompt_template: Cover [SONG_NAME] with acoustic guitar and minimal production. Keep vocals minimal or instrumental.
